request.prompt:
Verify exactly one K-pop event candidate using web search. Do not bundle another event.

Candidate ID: memory-f2-red-velvet-2026-08-15
Artist: Red Velvet
Claimed dates: August 15, 2026
Claimed venue: Olympic Hall
Claimed city/country: Seoul, South Korea
Raw candidate title: Red Velvet live event at Olympic Hall on August 15, 2026

Strict evidence rules (do not relax): exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence; accept only an official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source; artist AND exact date(s) must match (timezone tolerance only ±1 day); venue/city must not conflict; a general tour announcement without this stop/date is not a match. Return UNCONFIRMED if no qualifying source is found and CONTRADICTED if reliable evidence conflicts.

Return only these compact fields, in this order. Cite factual claims with the web-search citation mechanism:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED | UNCONFIRMED | CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true | false
DATE_MATCH: true | false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: true | false
MATCHED_DATES: ...
SOURCE_QUALITY: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media | none
SOURCE_URLS: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

input.query: Red Velvet Olympic Hall Seoul August 2026 concert

content.title: List of Red Velvet live performances - Wikipedia
Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August
Olympic Hall Seoul, Tickets for Concerts & Music Events 2026 – Songkick
Red Velvet Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.
Red Velvet Concert & Tour History (Updated for 2026) | Concert Archives

content.text:
The Korea JoongAng Daily article (a reliable media source) is highly relevant. It confirms a Red Velvet fan concert in Seoul in August 2026, but specifies the venue as **Korea University's Tiger Dome gymnasium** on **August 1 and 2**, not Olympic Hall on August 15. No source confirms a Red Velvet event at Olympic Hall on August 15, 2026. The Wikipedia Olympic Hall page lists events at that venue around that period but does not mention Red Velvet on August 15.

---

VERDICT: CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true
DATE_MATCH: false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: false
MATCHED_DATES: none
SOURCE_QUALITY: reliable_media
SOURCE_URLS: https://www.koreajoongangdaily.com/entertainment/girl-group-red-velvet-to-return-with-new-album-fan-concert-in-august/12723807
REASON:

citations.cited_text: Girl group Red Velvet will return with a new album and a fan concert in August, its agency SM Entertainment announced on Monday.
citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August

citations.cited_text: The fan concert will take place at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University in northern Seoul at 6 p.m. on Aug. 1 and at 4 p.m. on Aug. 2.
citations.title: Girl group Red Velvet to return with new album, fan concert in August

content.text: SM Entertainment announced Red Velvet's 2026 fan concert in Seoul, but it is scheduled at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University on August 1 and 2
— not at Olympic Hall on August 15, directly contradicting the claimed date and venue.
